status: exact finite realized-path L7-to-L8 sig_0/sig_1 trace; not a universal Post quotient, contraction lemma, availability bound, or unconditional theorem

canonical_run.command: env OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 nice -n 15 python3 -B design/far_secant_future_trace.py run --output /tmp/far-secant-future-trace-canonical.json

exact_scope.address_semantics: the contiguous realized ordered path and its actual parent and child connector choices; no independent address-stream product

proved_by_finite_computation: the retained L7 parents are closed under exactly the child slots of their actually selected connector words
each sig_0 is the pinned exact tagged-endpoint killed-word mask and each sig_1 is its actual ordered one-generation trace
a direct endpoint/carried-line state, even with the actual connector word, is noncongruent in two concrete classes because it omits endpoint-to-other-point joins
evidence_only: the diagnostic shell projection is not refuted in its sole merged child class
most endpoint shell edges increase by one under the recorded affine transport
not_proved: a finite exact centered-state quotient, because all 146 literal child states and all 42 parent trace states are singletons
transition congruence under alternate legal connector choices
sig_2 stabilization or an age-at-least-two recurrence
a contraction or ranking inequality controlling the endpoint-to-other-point join closure
positive connector availability or an unconditional infinite walk
